sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27931" key="dolomh/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δολο-μήδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <sense id="n27931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wily, crafty,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">f. l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
